title: Red Hat Security Advisory: libssh security update
overview:
An update for libssh is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.0 Update Services for SAP Solutions.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: libssh security update

An update for libssh is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.0 Update Services for SAP Solutions.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for libssh is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.0 Update Services for SAP Solutions.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
libssh-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.src.rpm
libssh-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.ppc64le.rpm
libssh-config-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.noarch.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.ppc64le.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.ppc64le.rpm
libssh-devel-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.ppc64le.rpm
libssh-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.i686.rpm
libssh-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.x86_64.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.i686.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.x86_64.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.i686.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.x86_64.rpm
libssh-devel-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.i686.rpm
libssh-devel-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.x86_64.rpm
libssh-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.aarch64.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.aarch64.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.aarch64.rpm
libssh-devel-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.aarch64.rpm
libssh-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.s390x.rpm
libssh-debuginfo-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.s390x.rpm
libssh-debugsource-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.s390x.rpm
libssh-devel-0.9.6-3.el9_0.1.s390x.rpm

CVE-2025-5318: A flaw was found in the libssh library in versions less than 0.11.2. An out-of-bounds read can be triggered in the sftp_handle function due to an incorrect comparison check that permits the function to access memory beyond the valid handle list and to return an invalid pointer, which is used in further processing. This vulnerability allows an authenticated remote attacker to potentially read unintended memory regions, exposing sensitive information or affect service behavior.
